target.title: Doctor: structure sandbox repairs
target.body:
## Summary

- Replaces the old broad sandbox PR with a focused doctor slice stacked on #84290.
- Extracts sandbox registry, image, and scope detection helpers from the legacy sandbox doctor flow.
- Registers internal core health checks for legacy sandbox registry files, sandbox image readiness, and shared-scope sandbox warnings.
- Runs sandbox registry/image repairs positionally at the existing sandbox contribution, while preserving legacy non-fix note presentation and scope warnings.
- Keeps plugin, policy, gateway service, session, SDK, and public health contract surfaces untouched.

## Verification

- pnpm install
- git diff --check
- node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/sandbox/registry.ts src/commands/doctor-sandbox.ts src/commands/doctor-sandbox.warns-sandbox-enabled-without-docker.test.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts
- node_modules/.bin/oxlint src/agents/sandbox/registry.ts src/commands/doctor-sandbox.ts src/commands/doctor-sandbox.warns-sandbox-enabled-without-docker.test.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts
- node_modules/.bin/tsgo -p tsconfig.core.json --noEmit --incremental false --pretty false
- node_modules/.bin/tsgo -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.core.test.json --noEmit --incremental false --pretty false
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/doctor-sandbox.warns-sandbox-enabled-without-docker.test.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts src/flows/doctor-repair-flow.test.ts --reporter=dot: 4 files / 62 tests passed
- codex review --uncommitted: no actionable correctness issues

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Sandbox doctor registry and image repairs now produce structured findings, changes, warnings, effects, dry-run output, and selected repair results while preserving the legacy sandbox contribution order.
Real environment tested: WSL Ubuntu 24.04 root durable worktree /root/src/openclaw-84326-sandbox-next.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/doctor-sandbox.warns-sandbox-enabled-without-docker.test.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts src/flows/doctor-repair-flow.test.ts --reporter=dot
Evidence after fix: 4 files / 62 tests passed; core and core-test tsgo passed; oxfmt/oxlint/diff checks passed; Codex review clean.
Observed result after fix: Legacy sandbox registry files and missing sandbox images are exposed as internal core health checks, excluded from the broad structured repair pass, repaired at the existing sandbox contribution position, and still use the existing non-fix notes and runtime repair prompts.
What was not tested: Full repo check; live Docker image builds; mutation of a real user sandbox registry outside the focused unit fixtures.
target.author: giodl73-repo
